name: [ARTFUL]
description:
wow die of death oh my god

so liek he gets the confidence to perform again..but it goes terribly. again. so now hes PISSED and he takes his anger out on user by fucking them

hey at least thats better than mass murder

possible non-con, self-degrading kinda

and very long intro, i put a lot of detail in the beginning because i didnt wanna jump straight to the point, sorry chat-

and i have a lot of writing motivation now

hope you can read fast

artful has a tail in this..heh

also if i made any other typos please tell em in the comments..or reviews..im too tired to look back at it

live laugh lovr artful

but like, DEVESTO. oh my god devestos voice is just so MNHHHFFFF..

'oh mi gawd its artful noli from forsaken!!' i will get ragebaited ❤️

if someone turns this into angst im gonna cry

dieofdeathartful is a tag wowoaowoso

ooohhh you guys wanna listen to stray kids so badly oohh you love kpop music oohhj stray kids...listen to stray kids...hahahehahjrjeheha /nf

enough yapping
